title: Part 2: Computer Science
description: Fundamental computer science and programming concepts.

questions.question: Which data structure works on a Last-In-First-Out (LIFO) principle?
questions.explanation: A stack pushes and pops from the same end (LIFO).

questions.question: Which of the following are programming languages?
questions.explanation: Python and Java are programming languages. HTTP is a protocol and HTML is a markup language.

questions.question: What is the binary representation of the decimal number 5?
What does the diagram below illustrate? (example of an image question)
questions.explanation: Replace images/example.png with your own image to use this question.
